tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible acute or stress-related elevation. Lipid profile reveals marked hypercholesterolemia, hypertriglyceridemia, elevated LDL, and low HDL, indicating high cardiovascular risk. Renal function, electrolytes, and urine microalbumin are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes and aggressive management of dyslipidemia.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
